queries.question: What is the name of each professor's course?
queries.sql:
SELECT Professors.fullname, Courses.Course_name AS Teaching_Subject
FROM Professors
JOIN Courses ON Courses.professor_id = Professors.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?course_name WHERE {
  ?professors a :Instructors .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses p:hasProfessors ?professors .
  ?professors p:name ?fullname .
  ?courses p:course_name ?course_name .
}

queries.question: Which discipline and course are associated with which professor?
queries.sql:
SELECT Professors.fullname, Disciplines.name, Courses.Course_name
FROM Professors
JOIN Courses ON Courses.professor_id = Professors.id
JOIN Disciplines ON Courses.Discipline_id = Disciplines.id;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?name ?course_name WHERE {
  ?professors a :Instructors .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses p:hasProfessors ?professors .
  ?disciplines a :Academic_Discipline .
  ?courses p:hasDisciplines ?disciplines .
  ?professors p:name ?fullname .
  ?disciplines p:name ?name .
  ?courses p:course_name ?course_name .
}

queries.question: What discipline and courses are linked to which professor?
queries.sql:
SELECT Disciplines.name, Courses.Course_name, COUNT(*) AS Number_of_Professors
FROM Courses
JOIN Disciplines ON Courses.Discipline_id = Disciplines.id
GROUP BY Disciplines.name, Courses.Course_name;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name_g ?course_name_g (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?disciplines a :Academic_Discipline .
  ?courses p:hasDisciplines ?disciplines .
  ?disciplines p:name ?name_g .
  ?courses p:course_name ?course_name_g .
}
GROUP BY ?name_g ?course_name_g

queries.question: How many professors are teaching each subject?
queries.sql:
SELECT Disciplines.name AS Teaching_Subject, COUNT(*) AS Number_of_Professors
FROM Courses
JOIN Disciplines ON Courses.Discipline_id = Disciplines.id
GROUP BY Disciplines.name;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name_g (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?disciplines a :Academic_Discipline .
  ?courses p:hasDisciplines ?disciplines .
  ?disciplines p:name ?name_g .
}
GROUP BY ?name_g

queries.question: How many professors are teaching each subject?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?course_name_g (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses p:course_name ?course_name_g .
}
GROUP BY ?course_name_g

queries.question: Provide a list of professors along with the subjects they teach
queries.sql:
SELECT Professors.fullname, Disciplines.name AS Teaching_Subject
FROM Professors
JOIN Courses ON Courses.professor_id = Professors.id
JOIN Disciplines ON Courses.Discipline_id = Disciplines.id;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?name WHERE {
  ?professors a :Instructors .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses p:hasProfessors ?professors .
  ?disciplines a :Academic_Discipline .
  ?courses p:hasDisciplines ?disciplines .
  ?professors p:name ?fullname .
  ?disciplines p:name ?name .
}
